sources.note: Checked the corpus file first (docs/research/job-postings-corpus/comp-extraction/technical-product-manager.json): it was already fully incorporated into the first-pass comp-structure.json entry (its Mid points map to Cisco/Caterpillar, its Principal points to Hasbro/Scopely/Upwork), so there was no missed-but-present data to recover from the existing corpus alone. New real data found via targeted web search (job postings/mirrors, not crowdsourced averages): (1) Wheelhouse, plain-titled 'Technical Product Manager' (mid-to-senior, 5+ yrs PM experience required), base $136,000-$152,000, remote-fi
